channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods.
item.description: President Donald Trump imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods Monday, citing unfair discrimination against American autos.

item.title: Houthi rebels threaten to block another key strait amid U.S.-Iran war.
item.description: The Iran-aligned Houthi militia in Yemen announced a naval blockade of the Bab Al-Mandeb Strait.

item.title: Soccer unites a Bhutanese community in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania.
item.description: Harrisburg hosts one of the largest Nepali-speaking Bhutanese refugee communities in the U.S. Soccer helps generations connect.

item.title: Men pursue college degrees for stable careers, finding opportunity in nursing
item.description: Men make up about 1 in 8 nurses, but their numbers are rising due to a strong job market and recruitment efforts.
